title: Piquant Spicy Malaysian Turkey Satay
description: A spicy and flavorful satay dish featuring juicy turkey, inspired by Malaysian cuisine. Serve with a side of peanut sauce for an authentic experience.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: use gluten-free soy sauce if necessary

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, soy sauce, brown sugar, and chili flakes.
Add the turkey breast to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated turkey onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the satay for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the satay to a plate and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
Serve the satay hot with a side of peanut sauce and steamed vegetables.
Garnish with lime wedges and serve immediately.
